title: Deploy Complete Agent Architecture
description: Transform from single Boss bottleneck to 5-agent specialized organization
rationale: Single agent handling 6+ parallel projects caused context bloat and prevented focus. Agent specialization enables parallel execution with quality gates.

impact.positive: 5x parallel execution capacity, specialized expertise, quality verification

results: All 5 agents active with role memory and governance frameworks

title: Implement File-Based Agent Persistence
description: Move from conversation-dependent memory to file-based persistence system
rationale: Context window limitations (68k+ tokens) and agent resurrection needs require persistent memory independent of conversation history.

impact.positive: Unlimited agent memory, automatic resurrection, token management

results: All agents have ROLE.md, SELF-GOVERNANCE.md, and memory persistence

title: Enable Direct Orien-Agent Communication
description: Allow Orien to communicate directly with agents for requirements gathering
decision: APPROVED - Direct communication enabled for efficiency
rationale: Boss mediation for requirements gathering creates unnecessary bottleneck. Direct communication enables faster clarification while maintaining coordination oversight.

impact.positive: Faster requirements gathering, reduced Boss bottleneck

results: All agent sessions available for direct communication, Boss monitoring coordination

title: Implement QA Agent Verification Gates
description: All agent work must pass QA verification before delivery to Orien
decision: APPROVED - Quality gates mandatory for all deliverables
rationale: Agent autonomy requires quality verification to maintain standards. QA Agent provides independent verification using devils advocate protocol.

impact.positive: Consistent quality, error prevention, process improvement
impact.risks: Potential delays, QA bottleneck if overloaded

results: QA Agent ready with verification pipeline, devils advocate protocol loaded
